LITTLEWIZARD-FIRE_ELEMENT.description:
Every [blue]2[/blue] stacks of [gold]Fire Element[/gold], take [blue]1[/blue] damage at the start of turn.
When an enemy has one [gold]Element[/gold] and receives another [gold]Element[/gold], it triggers [gold]Element Synergy[/gold], which changes into other effects.
LITTLEWIZARD-FIRE_ELEMENT.smartDescripti: Every [blue]2[/blue] stacks of [gold]Fire Element[/gold], take [blue]1[/blue] damage at the start of turn.
LITTLEWIZARD-FIRE_ELEMENT.title: Fire Element
LITTLEWIZARD-WATER_ELEMENT.title: Water Element
LITTLEWIZARD-WATER_ELEMENT.description:
For each [blue]3[/blue] [gold]Water Element[/gold], the enemy loses [blue]1[/blue] [gold]Strength[/gold] (rounded up).
At the end of enemy turn, the more [gold]Water Element[/gold] the enemy has, the more [gold]Water Element[/gold] the enemy will lose.
When an enemy has one [gold]Element[/gold] and receives another [gold]Element[/gold], it triggers [gold]Element Synergy[/gold], which changes into other effects.
LITTLEWIZARD-WATER_ELEMENT.smartDescript:
For each [blue]3[/blue] [gold]Water Element[/gold], the eneny loses [blue]1[/blue] [gold]Strength[/gold] (rounded up).At the end of enemy turn, lose [blue]{decrementAmount}[/blue] [gold]Water Element[/gold].
Current Water Element reduces [blue]{tempWaterPower}[/blue] Strength.
LITTLEWIZARD-EARTH_ELEMENT.smartDescript: Every [blue]1[/blue] stack of [gold]Earth Element[/gold], the first time you deal damage to this enemy each turn, gain [gold]Block[/gold] equal to the number of [gold]Earth Element[/gold] stacks.

LITTLEWIZARD-FIRE_EARTH_REACTOR.descript:
Every [blue]1[/blue] time you deal damage, deal additional damage equal to the combined [gold]Earth+Fire Element[/gold] stacks.
Each time you deal damage to this enemy, gain [gold]Block[/gold] equal to the combined Earth+Fire Element stacks.
[gold]Element Synergy[/gold] is removed at the end of turn.
